titleStmt.title: Letter from J.W. Rainey to Major General, Army Veterinary Service, 11 January 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: J.W.Rainey

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from J.W. Rainey to Major General, Army Veterinary Services with a request to inform Patrick Alphonsus Carroll about an interview.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
AssistantDeputy Director
of Veterinary Services
Irish Command Will you please request Mr. P.H.Carroll, of Reddy's Hotel,
Carlow, Ireland.
to attend at your office for a personal interview, with a view to his
being granted a temporary commission in the Army Veterinary Corps. The conditions of pay, &&c., are enclosed If considered suitable, will you please arrange for him to be
medically examined, and return the forms duly completed to this office,
together with the medical certificate. (Sa) JW Rainey Major
for Major-General
Director-General, A. V.S. A.V.D.,
WAR OFFICE
11th January, 1916.
